form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (30.70) when eighth over 525m at The Meadows in a Free For All. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and four places from nine starts. Makes strong appeal.

form.formComment: Last start finished 6th over 450m at Warrnambool beaten 7 lengths (26.15) behind Bush Big Show in a Grade 5 on April 2. Fought on last time. Has the ability and right in the mix.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Raced wide turning out of back straight.
Slow to begin; Raced wide in home straight.

form.formComment: Was a winner three back at this track then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when fifth (23.24) at Warragul. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished last over 460m at Geelong beaten 16 lengths (26.88) behind Robinson in a Grade 4/5 on March 28. On best form is more than capable. Keep safe.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Bendigo over 500m in 28.47. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when seventh over 500m at Bendigo at Grade 4/5 level. Happy enough to dismiss in this field.

form.formComment: Working his way into winning form after his success on March 10 at this track over 450m. Last start was second over 450m in 25.46, behind Paw Fable. The form from his last run is stacking up nicely. Follow up.
